title: tragacantha fragifera
intro: Tragacantha fragifera, also known as the fragrant or thorny vetch, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. It is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the digestive system. Tragacantha fragifera can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
